input.oldString: const activeCurrencies = selectingFor === 'from' ? fromCurrencies : selectingFor === 'to' ? toCurrencies : currencies
input.newString:
const activeCurrencies = selectingFor === 'from' 
    ? fromCurrencies 
    : selectingFor === 'to' 
    ? toCurrencies 
    : selectingFor === 'batch' && batchChain
    ? currencies.filter(c => c.chainId === batchChain.id)
    : currencies
